name: Huntsman's Volley
description: Notes A unique quiver that fires one shot followed by 20 smaller shots that ignore enemy DEF at a delay. Theoretically this quiver could slightly outdamage Quiver of Shadows, however this is unlikely to happen as there is a low chance that all 21 shots will hit a single target. This quiver also loses to the void quiver in mana efficiency. Nevertheless, it remains a great quiver against enemies with high DEF and in situations where paralyzing enemies does not matter.

stats.shots: 1 (Additional 20 shots after 1 second)Additional Shot: 100-130 (+1 per WIS over 34) (average: 115) Ignores defense of target
stats.projectiles: 1 (Additional 20 shots after 1 second)Additional Shot: 100-130 (+1 per WIS over 34) (average: 115) Ignores defense of target
